name: novaclaw
description: NovaClaw - Personal AI Agent for Telegram

scripts.copy-migrations: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src='src/storage/migrations';const dest='dist/storage/migrations';if(!fs.existsSync(dest))fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.sql')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dest,f)));console.log('Migrations copied to dist/')"
scripts.postinstall: npm run build && npx playwright install chromium
